channel.title: 柳宗元 on un01s notes
channel.description: Recent content in 柳宗元 on un01s notes

item.title: 黔驴技穷
item.description:
a healthy oil company has a geologist in charge, a mature one has an engineer in charge, a declining one has an accountant in charge, and a dying one has a lawyer in charge. – Oil industry proverb

“The mightiest of Americans were, for a brief time, revealed as human beings.” – John Kenneth Galbraith on the Great Crash of 1929

20260524: Today’s the day Arsenal get their hands on the Premier League trophy in 22 years. The victory is a testament to never giving up, to believing you can do the impossible, to knowing that hope is perpetually justified, and most importantly to never ever accepting that something is done.
